message:
test(robot): add pagination E2E test and expand fake bv coverage

Add E2E test for robot-status pagination and expand fake bv tool to
support additional robot commands needed for testing.

E2E test (TestRobotStatusPagination):
- Creates two synthetic agent sessions
- Calls --robot-status with --robot-limit=1 --robot-offset=0
- Validates pagination response structure:
  - pagination.limit matches requested value
  - pagination.offset matches requested value
  - pagination.count matches returned session count
  - pagination.total >= count
  - pagination.has_more is true when more results exist
  - pagination.next_cursor points to next offset

Fake bv tool additions:
- --robot-triage-by-label: Returns grouped triage JSON by label
- --robot-triage-by-track: Returns grouped triage JSON by track
- --robot-history: Returns history with stats and events
- --robot-burndown: Returns sprint burndown with progress metrics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,14 @@ case "$1" in
         cat "$FIXTURES_DIR/bv_triage.json" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"generated_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "data_hash": "test", "triage": {"meta": {"version": "1.0.0"}, "quick_ref": {"open_count": 10, "actionable_count": 5}}}'
         exit 0
         ;;
+    --robot-triage-by-label)
+        echo '{"generated_at":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","triage_by_label":[{"label":"backend","top_pick":{"id":"bd-1","title":"Test"}}]}'
+        exit 0
+        ;;
+    --robot-triage-by-track)
+        echo '{"generated_at":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","triage_by_track":[{"track":"main","top_pick":{"id":"bd-1","title":"Test"}}]}'
+        exit 0
+        ;;
     --robot-plan)
         cat "$FIXTURES_DIR/bv_plan.json" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"generated_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "plan": {"tracks": []}}'
         exit 0
@@ -53,6 +61,14 @@ case "$1" in
         echo '{"graph":{"nodes":[],"edges":[]},"format":"json"}'
         exit 0
         ;;
+    --robot-history)
+        echo '{"stats":{"total_beads":1,"total_commits":0,"correlated_count":0},"histories":[{"id":"bd-1","title":"Test","events":[]}]}'
+        exit 0
+        ;;
+    --robot-burndown)
+        echo '{"sprint":"s1","progress":{"total_points":10,"completed_points":4,"percent_complete":40,"days_remaining":3},"scope_changes":[],"at_risk":[]}'
+        exit 0
+        ;;
     --robot-forecast)
         echo '{"forecasts":[{"id":"bd-1","title":"Test issue","estimated_eta":"2026-02-01T00:00:00Z","confidence_level":0.8,"dependency_count":2,"critical_path":true,"blocking_factors":["blocked"]}]}'
         exit 0
